title: PharmacyCase
description: Canonical Phase 6 pharmacy case aggregate freeze. Detailed provider choice, dispatch, outcome, bounce-back, and visibility payloads remain later-owned but their typed references are already frozen here.

pharmacyCaseId.description: Stable identifier for the governed pharmacy branch.

originRequestId.description: Originating request identifier from the canonical Request aggregate.

originTaskId.description: The upstream task or workflow that produced the pharmacy branch candidate.

pharmacyIntentId.description: Reference to the preserved pre-case pharmacy intent record.

oneOf.description: Supersession evidence for the source decision.

sourceDecisionSupersessionRef.description: Supersession evidence for the source decision when present.

patientRef.description: Patient anchor for the pharmacy case.

tenantId.description: Tenant identifier for isolation and routing.

candidatePathway.description: Current candidate pathway or fallback lane selected by eligibility.

choiceSessionRef.description: Later-owned provider choice session reference reserved for seq_343.

selectedProviderRef.description: Later-owned selected provider reference reserved for seq_343.

activeConsentRef.description: Later-owned consent record reference reserved for seq_343.

activeConsentCheckpointRef.description: Later-owned consent checkpoint reference reserved for seq_343.

latestConsentRevocationRef.description: Latest consent revocation reference reserved for seq_343.

activeDispatchAttemptRef.description: Current dispatch attempt reference reserved for seq_343.

oneOf.description: Current dispatch or outcome correlation reference.

correlationRef.description: Current dispatch or outcome correlation reference reserved for seq_343.

outcomeRef.description: Current authoritative outcome settlement reference reserved for seq_343.

bounceBackRef.description: Current bounce-back or urgent-return reference reserved for seq_344.

ownershipEpoch.description: Current ownership epoch used for fenced mutations.

currentConfirmationGateRefs.description: Current confirmation gate references reserved for seq_343 detail.

currentClosureBlockerRefs.description: Current closure blocker references including outcome, urgent-return, and practice-visibility debt.

activeReachabilityDependencyRefs.description: Current reachability dependency references reserved for seq_344 detail.

slaTargetAt.description: Current SLA target timestamp derived from the governing service lane and urgency posture.

ServiceTypeDecision.title: ServiceTypeDecision
ServiceTypeDecision.description: Resolved service-lane and candidate pathway decision.

candidatePathways.description: Candidate clinical pathways considered for the case.

gatewayResult.description: High-level gateway result for pharmacy entry.

exclusionFlags.description: Exclusion flags resolved before pathway scoring.

redFlagState.description: Global red-flag state for the candidate.

evidenceSufficiency.description: Summary evidence sufficiency score before pathway selection.

rulePackVersion.description: Rule pack version used at decision time.

pathwayCode.description: Selected clinical pathway code when a named pathway is being evaluated.

evaluatedPathways.description: Per-pathway replay snapshot for all named pathways considered at evaluation time.

matchedRuleIds.description: Matched rule identifiers persisted with the replayable evaluation record.

thresholdSnapshot.description: Frozen threshold and exponent snapshot used for historical replay.

rulePackVersion.description: Frozen rule-pack version used at evaluation time.

ageSexGateResult.description: Outcome of the hard age and sex gate.

pathwayGateResult.description: Pathway gate result after thresholds and exclusions.

recommendedLane.description: Recommended lane after pathway and fallback evaluation.

finalDisposition.description: Final eligibility disposition emitted by the evaluation record.

oneOf.description: Reason code explaining why fallback was blocked or unsafe.

unsafeFallbackReasonCode.description: Reason code explaining why fallback was blocked or unsafe when applicable.
